title: Amaranth
description:
(Yes, This mod is technically in the Amaranthium Series...)
Adds Amaranths (and a couple of references) to Minecraft.
Amaranths have a couple of neat uses.
Enjoy ;)
body:
Amaranth adds, well, Amaranths, a flower that can be brewed into an empty bottle to get a strength potion, stonecutted to get wheat, and you can make amaranth bales.
also adds many more weapons, an OHKO, which you would need to cheat to get, exept under very certain circumstances, and a couple of tools.
the two armours, and two certain weapons, have a keybind (Unbound by default) that triggers an ability.
  
Compatible Items/Armours for Ability Key:
1. Ghost Cloak (Turns you Invisible)
2. Maid Armour (Dust Bomb (Kinda))
3. Candlewick Rapier (Fire Resistance)
4. Chaotic Concoction (Good Potion Effects)
5. Masquerader's Rapier (Shoots a Projectile)


I made Items based off of the minecraft modding youtubers who i watched and became inspired to mod by.
these in clude:
Masqueraader's Rapier - Winsweep
RAT mask (and maid outfit + featherduster) - doctor4t
Anchaxe (Anchor Axe) - Luxintrus
the Square of Eight Sides (it's actually a pickaxe, believe it or not) -  Eightsided Square
"The Pinecone" (I would prefer if you didn't use it in PvP, as it only exists as a meme weapon for my friend) - Pineconewastaken

this mod is mainly for fun, having Reference Items to characters I like, E.G. RAT (Content SMP), Mollo (Rivals of Aether).

Also adds a new mob, 'The Statue'
100hp, immobile, immune to all damage except Explosions & (I think) Anvils.


Anyone who wants to make an addon for this mod can if they wish.

As always, JEI is recommended, as it makes getting the harder-to-obtain items easier to obtain.
